description_long: This is a large, modern bungalow complex featuring two main residential wings connected by a central section, all surrounded by a spacious, fenced yard. The exterior walls are predominantly white with dark gray gable roofs, and the property includes a backyard with a swimming pool, trampoline, swing set, and a soccer goal. The central section appears to have a balcony or terrace overlooking the pool area, with multiple patio lounge chairs and tables arranged around the pool. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light and access to the outdoor spaces. The yard is mostly grass, bordered by a low white fence, and the overall layout is symmetrical with recreational amenities concentrated in the rear. The design suggests a contemporary suburban lifestyle with a focus on outdoor living and family activities.
description: A modern, spacious bungalow complex with two main wings, a central terrace, and a large backyard featuring a pool, trampoline, and play equipment. The exterior is white with dark gable roofs and large windows, surrounded by a fenced grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical wings, and the central section with a balcony above the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the property, the pool area, and the backyard amenities including the trampoline and swing set.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard, pool, trampoline, swing set, soccer goal, and the open layout of the outdoor living space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other wing, the pool, and the expanse of the grassy yard with recreational features.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
